hd311214eg8f7eg4fa0g9432g6796f9f544a7: I - I didn't mean for this to happen.
h37112e5eg0d8bg4cb5g9445gd9767f37d6f6: What happened? It sounded like a heated argument.
h904bb43egecebg49a3gb3c6g3df25c0b958e: Those poor boys were looking for their little sister, Mayrina. The girl who is... staying with me.
h7a625c8cg5ca3g4afbg8f38gd9c6eb67afdb: This is all my fault. But I made a promise!
h462aa6e2gd563g43f5gbac9gcc9611d062a1: Mayrina begged me not to breathe a word if they came looking for her. And my word is my bond.
h0f81e582g384bg430eg8f3fg218c2133cf12: That poor thing will be distraught. We can't let her know - it'd break her poor heart.
heb056b5egec9cg4c18gb8acgcd0daafef101: I'd best get going, but please stop by my house. I'd like to thank you proper.
he38c4107g2d45g4a10g8840gc6b3443294c0: Do you know this 'Mayrina' they mentioned?
he712c44fgacf7g40f1gb8f8g5fabe540c87d: She's their little sister. And... she's staying with me.
hac53e0bbg511eg4681gb110ge5e047f811f1: The best thanks are paid in gold.
h7d520c48g9a6bg404fg9990g9ce00c6433ed: Oh, you're a cheeky pup, aren't you?
h83f08062g8698g4b97g8db5ga916f3670664: But I can respect someone who gets down to business.
h01dc81e2g93feg418fga044g76d0332107b0: And such heroic deeds deserve proper thanks.
h00c7507ag44afg463eg893eg8b3b954388d3: Why don't you stop by my house? I'll be sure to look after you. See you soon, dearie.
